📊 Riyadh IT job market — week of Jun 6 – Jun 12

221 new IT job openings appeared on Riyadh job boards this week.

1. Data Acquisition — 31 roles
2. Data Sharing — 31 roles
3. IT Management — 24 roles
4. Program Manager — 24 roles
5. Data Management — 24 roles
6. Technical Support — 23 roles

🏢 Actively hiring: Müller's Solutions, Qiddiya | القدية, Almarai - المراعي

Which of these areas are you hiring for — or moving into? Let me know in the comments 👇
